nasb.text: My very own vineyard is at my disposal; The thousand shekels are for you, Solomon, And two hundred are for those who take care of its fruit.”

esv.text: My vineyard, my very own, is before me; you, O Solomon, may have the thousand, and the keepers of the fruit two hundred.

cnv.text: 我自己的葡萄園卻在我面前， 所羅門哪，一萬一千四百克歸給你， 二千二百八十克歸給那些看守果子的人。

ccb.text: 我的葡萄园，我自己作主。 所罗门啊，你的一千块银子自己留着， 二百块银子给管果园的人。
